title: Document AsyncRW trait usage pattern in transport.rs
description: AsyncRW trait (lines 21-24) has a brief comment explaining it unifies TcpStream and Socks5Stream, but doesn't explain the key insight: why it's necessary for ws_upgrade_and_auth<S: AsyncRW> to be generic over the stream type. A future contributor adding IPv6 SOCKS5 support or modifying the proxy path might not realize that both branches (lines 274-297) must produce types implementing AsyncRW, and could introduce a type mismatch. Add a doc comment to ws_upgrade_and_auth explaining: 'Generic over S: AsyncRW so both Socks5Stream (proxy path) and TcpStream (direct path) can use the same WebSocket upgrade logic.'
